title: The Role of the New Characters
display_title: The Role of the New Characters
wikitext:
[]: The Role of the New Characters             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Sun Nov 26, 2006 10:21 pm this is where we discuss the roles the new characters could play in this new telling. for example, will there be a new child? if so, how important will he/she play in the story. definately very interesting to me right now, I can only imagine the importance of one new character, let alone more than one. DISCUSS!

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:07 am Potentials Mana...id like that if they do it right... Mayumi...hell yeah...shes teh win... Toji's little sister...ZOMG loli...lol... Whoever it was that was taking care of Shinji when he was little (was it Grandparents???) Dr. Katsuragi Digi Charat...(we can dream)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 27, 2006 1:33 am master0rolando wrote: Toji's little sister...ZOMG loli...lol...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 2:19 am we never see Toji's Neechan...and we get to see of the Dr....A HAND! and sillouette...i dont think they really count... we may get an anti-Shinji... like a cool dude whos self confident and emotionally balanced...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 27, 2006 3:44 am master0rolando wrote: we never see Toji's Neechan...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 4:27 am i have no idea what imouto means...i mustve been watching too much GreenGreen to make that mistake... either way...if one of them became a more prominent role...as in you get to see their eyes...they have lines...bigger parts...(can you say "Asuka vs Suzuhara-chan luv rivalry?")...it would count as "new character"...could be someone new

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 27, 2006 10:39 am master0rolando wrote: i have no idea what imouto means...

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 27, 2006 10:47 am Evangelion needs more Osaka.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Mon Nov 27, 2006 4:21 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Evangelion needs more Osaka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 27, 2006 4:24 pm EVA Does It Best wrote: osaka, as in the city? or Asuka, as in the character

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Nov 27, 2006 4:58 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Osaka as in the character from Azumanga Daiyo.

[]:             Quote Post by Dascoo » Mon Nov 27, 2006 5:14 pm Either way, Shinji will still be an emo.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Nov 27, 2006 7:52 pm screw Osaka and Tomo...Yomi + Sakaki = teh s3xornezz... and isnt Digiko getting any traction?...dont write her off just yet... but seriously itd be interesting to have Mayumi in it... i like her... Larry the Cable Guy wrote: She got beauty murk on er cheek...now dat was preddy sexy lika Cindy Crawford?...We get to kissin an stuff...i look it IT WAS A TICK...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Wed Nov 29, 2006 6:59 am Here's some love for Osaka and Tomo, +some additional props to Azumanga for being about the most asexual of all animes I've laid eyes on. DOWN WITH FANSERVICE

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Nov 29, 2006 9:01 am Kaysow wrote: Here's some love for Osaka and Tomo, +some additional props to Azumanga for being about the most asexual of all animes I've laid eyes on. DOWN WITH FANSERVICE

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 29, 2006 9:05 am To coin a phrase "Back on topic, bitches" Let's at least pretend to discuss characters in the context of an Eva movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Wed Nov 29, 2006 3:06 pm Maybe someone who represents all the Rei fanboys on 4chan and he goes, "ZOMG TEH Rei" and there's a part where he goes "suprise buttsecks" and....

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Wed Nov 29, 2006 3:34 pm Special guest appearence by Tiffany Grant? *shot*

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Nov 29, 2006 4:28 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: Maybe someone who represents all the Rei fanboys on 4chan and he goes, "ZOMG TEH Rei" and there's a part where he goes "suprise buttsecks" and....

[]:             Quote Post by EVA Does It Best » Sat Dec 02, 2006 2:21 am The Bastard King wrote: Special guest appearence by Tiffany Grant? *shot*
